name: Insane Deuces
description: The Insane Deuces originated in the Lathrop Homes in the early 1970s when a group of 12 guys, including a cousin of a Morgan Deuce, formed the Young Deuces and took over from the aging Junior Barons. They later separated from the Morgan Deuces and became known as the Insane Deuces. Their main enemies were the PBC and the Simon City Royals.

sources.title: Chicago Insane Deuces, Morgan Deuces, Jahn Deuces
United States v. Delatorre - U.S. District Court Northern District of Illinois
